title: Synaedrys omalokos

Synaedrys omalokos was previously classified as a member of the genus Metrosideros but has since been reclassified to fit its new classification. uses: Synaedrys omalokos, also known as the Tree Violet, has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its various properties. intro: Synaedrys omalokos, also known as the Pacific silver fir, is a coniferous tree species native to the Pacific coast of North America. The plant has been traditionally used to promote health and well-being, with reported health benefits including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help alleviate respiratory issues and boost the immune system.
